tests.name: API - GET /api/events/reports/attendance/data
tests.details: Returns JSON with summary statistics (events, RSVPs, present, absent, etc.)

tests.name: API - GET /api/events/reports/attendance?format=pdf
tests.details: Returns valid PDF file (4843 bytes, application/pdf content-type)

tests.name: API - GET /api/events/reports/attendance?format=excel
tests.details: Returns valid Excel file (6923 bytes, XLSX format confirmed by PK header)

tests.name: Frontend - Report Modal
tests.details: Modal opens with date filters, group filter, preview statistics, and download buttons

bug_fixed: Route ordering issue - /reports/attendance was being matched by /{event_id} pattern
resolution: Moved /reports/attendance and /reports/attendance/data routes before any /{event_id} routes in events.py
